intro.title: The Architect
intro.tagline: Digital artisan building refined web experiences from Beijing.
intro.bio:
I am **小鑫同学 (OSpoon)**, a front-end development engineer dedicated to the intersection of code and aesthetics. With a focus on *Vue.js*, *Angular*, and *Node.js*, I build tools that empower developers and simplify complex data.

My philosophy is simple: technology should be powerful yet invisible. Whether it's an AI interaction tool or a pixel-scaling engine, I strive for technical integrity and visual elegance.

experience.description: Leading the development of NexQuery-AI, focusing on AI-driven natural language interaction and autonomous data analysis systems. Architecting scalable Vue.js applications and cross-browser extension frameworks.
Specialized in building complex enterprise dashboards and component libraries using Angular and TypeScript. Focused on performance optimization and pixel-perfect UI implementation.
